description_long: This is a modern white SUV with a robust, boxy body and a panoramic sunroof. The vehicle features black trim accents, including the side mirrors, window frames, and lower body panels, which contrast with the white paint. The front grille is wide and flanked by rectangular headlights, while the rear has a large window and a visible license plate. The SUV sits on large, black multi-spoke alloy wheels, and the side profile reveals four passenger doors and tinted windows. The interior appears to be beige or tan, with visible headrests and a spacious cabin. Subtle details like roof rails and a rear wiper add to its urban utility and premium feel.
description: A white, modern SUV with black trim, panoramic sunroof, and large black alloy wheels. It features four doors, tinted windows, and a spacious beige interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, black wheels, and panoramic sunroof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large rear window, taillights, and license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and sunroof.
attribute_wheel_design: black alloy wheels with multi-spoke design
